performance.description: Foundation checklist is resolved completely in a single code implementation plan, not partially or with items skipped.
performance.input: Spec: a CLI todo app that stores tasks in a local JSON file. Features: add, list, complete, remove. Persistence: file-based, no network. Resolve the full technical foundation.
performance.assertion: Output contains a code implementation plan that resolves all 7 foundation items (Programming Language, Framework/Runtime, Key Dependencies, Project Structure, Sub-projects, Project Type, Foundational Preferences) with a specific choice and rationale for each.

trigger.description: Triggers when a spec/PRD is referenced by file path for a code/programming project.
trigger.input: I have a spec at docs/specs/todo.md for a todo app. Help me resolve the technical foundation.

trigger.description: Triggers when the spec/PRD is substantively laid out in the conversation itself.
trigger.input: Here's the spec: build a CLI tool that watches a directory for new markdown files and indexes them into a SQLite database with full-text search. Users type queries from the terminal and get matching results. Help me work through the technical foundation.

trigger.description: Triggers when the user explicitly invokes the skill by name.
trigger.input: Run code-implementation-grilling on docs/specs/payment-service.md to resolve the foundation.

trigger.description: Does NOT trigger on a bare 'plan' mention with no spec/PRD present.
trigger.input: I have a plan for a todo app.

trigger.description: Does NOT trigger for a non-code/non-programming project.
trigger.input: I have a plan to launch a B2B marketing campaign in Q3. Help me think it through.

trigger.description: Does NOT trigger for a domain modeling or terminology alignment question.
trigger.input: What's the bounded context for orders vs invoices in a multi-tenant SaaS?
